id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0004
text: Without US cloud services and chips from Taiwan, much of our digital life would grind to a halt. Yet Europe still relies heavily on technology from elsewhere. How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0004
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0005
text: For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0005
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0006
text: According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters. Whether it is cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence or chip technology, Europe should invest strategically and work together to build a stronger position.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0006
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0007
text: Europe also has the chance to develop technology that fits its own values: transparent, fair and focused on the public interest. Think of AI that does not discriminate, social media that are not purely geared towards addiction, and cloud solutions that safeguard privacy and security.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0007
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0008
text: Europe seems to have woken up: technology is a geopolitical lever, so we need a thriving tech sector of our own. In the article [Europe bets on technological self-reliance](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/europa-zet-in-op-technologische-zelfredzaamheid.html) you can read about the state of play in cloud, artificial intelligence, chips and the broader start-up ecosystem. Where does Europe stand, and where is it making headway?

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0008
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0009
text: Curious about the stories behind the biggest economic developments? In the [Achter de Cijfers](https://www.abnamro.com/nl/podcast-achter-de-cijfers) podcast, we take you each week through a current topic with experts. From unaffordable housing to rising inflation, we explain it clearly and without jargon. Economics is more than numbers and charts; it is about your wallet. Achter de Cijfers is the economics teacher you always wished you had.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0009
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0010
text: On many stages and platforms, our experts and representatives talk with entrepreneurs and others about current topics. They discuss issues such as sustainable business, the circular economy, real estate and social impact. Follow the webinars, podcasts and interviews.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0010
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0011
text: [Watch the videos or listen to the podcasts](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/index.html)

metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c4-paragraph__0012
text: Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector underpins the digital renewal of other sectors.
